product_overview: A client-side app that ingests Wide Text survey CSVs and provides brand-level and CEP-level analysis (MPen, Network Size, Mental Market Share) with interactive previews, charts, heatmap grid, and CSV export.
core_goals: Allow users to upload Wide Text survey CSVs and persist parsed data in sessionStorage for a single-page analysis workflow
Provide a data preview step so users can validate parsed brands, CEPs, and respondent counts before running analysis
Surface high-level KPIs and sortable brand metrics so teams can quickly identify top-performing brands
Offer deep-dive per-brand analysis and a CEP association heatmap with CSV export for downstream reporting

features.name: CSV Data Upload
features.description: Accept a Wide Text survey CSV (CEPs as columns, brand names in cells), parse it client-side, and persist parsed data in sessionStorage for subsequent analysis pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Upload a Wide Text format CSV file -> App parses the CSV using PapaParse -> See file name and success status after load -> Data is stored in sessionStorage for persistence -> Navigate to /preview
Navigate to / -> Upload a malformed or non-CSV file -> App parses and reports errors -> See parse error message and failure status -> Remain on / with no data stored in sessionStorage
Navigate to / -> Request sample format -> Receive sample CSV file to download

features.name: Data Preview
features.description: Show parsed dataset summary (brands, CEPs, respondent count) so users can confirm or reset before moving to analysis pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /preview -> See summary of parsed brands, CEPs, and respondent count -> Confirm data to proceed to analysis -> Navigate to /executive-summary
Navigate to /preview without parsed data in sessionStorage -> See empty state prompting upload -> Navigate to / to upload data
Navigate to /preview -> Decide to discard parsed data -> Reset data and return to /

features.name: Executive Summary
features.description: Provide high-level KPIs (average MPen, total brands, total respondents) and a sortable table of brand metrics (ranked by MMS) with CSV export.
user_flows: Navigate to /executive-summary -> View KPI cards for average MPen, total brands, and total respondents -> See sortable brand performance table ranked by MMS with top row visually emphasized -> Hover metric info icons to view definitions -> Export brand metrics as a CSV file
Navigate to /executive-summary without parsed data in sessionStorage -> See empty state indicating no data loaded -> Navigate to / to upload data

features.name: Brand Analysis
features.description: Allow users to choose a brand and view detailed metric cards (MPen, Network Size, MMS, Associations) plus a comparative bar chart highlighting the selected brand.
user_flows: Navigate to /brand-analysis -> Select a brand to analyze -> View metric cards for Mental Penetration, Network Size, Mental Market Share, and Associations -> See bar chart comparing MPen across brands with the selected brand highlighted -> Read MMS Position label indicating Strong/Stable/Vulnerable
Navigate to /brand-analysis without parsed data in sessionStorage -> See empty state prompting upload -> Navigate to / to upload data

features.name: CEP Grid
features.description: Display a heatmap of brand × CEP association strengths with summary widgets and the ability to export the full grid as CSV.
user_flows: Navigate to /cep-grid -> View summary widgets for Total CEPs, Active CEPs, and Dominant Space -> Scroll horizontally to inspect all CEP columns -> Read color-coded cells showing percentage of respondents linking each brand to each CEP -> Export the full grid as a CSV file
Navigate to /cep-grid without parsed data in sessionStorage -> See empty state prompting upload -> Navigate to / to upload data

tech_stack.other: PapaParse 5.5 (CSV parsing), react-dropzone 15, sessionStorage for state persistence

routes.description: CSV file upload page — user uploads a Wide Text survey CSV to load brand/CEP data
Data preview page — shows parsed data summary before confirming analysis
Overview dashboard showing MPen, NS, MMS metrics for all brands with sortable table
Per-brand deep-dive page with bar charts and metric cards for selected brand
Heatmap grid showing brand × CEP association strength with export functionality

features.name: CSV Data Upload
features.description: Upload a Wide Text format survey CSV where columns are CEPs and cells contain brand names
user_interactions: Click the upload area or drag and drop a CSV file
App parses the CSV using PapaParse
See file name and status after successful load
Click "Download Sample Format" link to get example CSV
Data is stored in sessionStorage for persistence across refreshes

features.name: Data Preview
features.description: Review parsed data (brands, CEPs, respondent count) before proceeding to analysis
user_interactions: See summary of parsed brands, CEPs, and respondent count
Click Confirm to proceed to Executive Summary
Click Cancel/Reset to discard data and return to upload

features.name: Executive Summary
features.description: High-level dashboard showing Mental Penetration, Network Size, and Mental Market Share for all brands
user_interactions: View KPI cards for average MPen, total brands, and total respondents
See sortable brand performance table ranked by MMS
Top brand row highlighted with accent border
MMS column shows progress bar relative to max MMS
Hover info icons to see metric definitions
Click Export CSV to download brand metrics as CSV file

features.name: Brand Analysis
features.description: Deep-dive analysis for a selected brand showing detailed metric cards and bar chart comparison
user_interactions: Select a brand from the dropdown
View Mental Penetration, Network Size, Mental Market Share, and Associations metric cards
See bar chart comparing MPen across all brands with selected brand highlighted in orange
Hover info icons for metric definitions
MMS Position label (Strong/Stable/Vulnerable) based on relative thresholds

features.name: CEP Grid
features.description: Heatmap visualization of brand × CEP associations with color intensity showing linkage strength
user_interactions: View summary metric widgets at top (Total CEPs, Active CEPs, Dominant Space)
Scroll horizontally to see all CEP columns
Read color-coded cells showing % of respondents linking brand to each CEP
Export the full grid as a CSV file

known_limitations.issue: App requires CSV data to be loaded before any analysis pages are functional; navigating directly to /executive-summary, /brand-analysis, or /cep-grid without data shows empty state
known_limitations.impact: No redirect guard — pages render empty if sessionStorage is cleared

known_limitations.issue: No login or authentication — app is fully client-side with no backend
known_limitations.impact: All data lives in sessionStorage; refreshing after clearing storage loses data

known_limitations.issue: Dev server running (not production build) — concurrent test load may cause instability
